title: ElliQ 是一款对老年人非常有用的伴侣机器人
summary: A week before the ElliQ robot arrived, a neurologist told me we need to rebalance my mom's life. Her Parkinson's disease medication had steadily become less effective over the previous month, and with it, she had slowly stopped doing many of the things crucial to managing the disease - exercising, socializing, and engaging in hobbies. […]（原题：ElliQ is a surprisingly helpful companion robot for older adults）
